info.title: API Locations

tags.name: Location Summary
tags.description: Fetches a summary of location data via pagination using query parameters.

tags.name: Location Detail
tags.description: Returns specific location information for just one location id.

tags.name: Geocode
tags.description: Converts an address into geographic coordinates. (Can also do reverse geocoding)

get.description: Returns a list of location summary data by pagination.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of entities in a page to return

get.description: Returns a specific location based on the location id.
Returns a human readable address or latitude and longitude cordinates.

parameters.name: outputFormat
parameters.description: Format of response expected. (json or xml)

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to look up that is URL Encoded.

parameters.name: latlng
parameters.description: The lat and long to lookup an address - that is URL encoded.

hours.example: Mon:  9am - 5pm | Tue:  9am - 5pm | Wed:  9am - 5pm | Thu:  9am - 5pm | Fri:  9am - 5pm | Sat:  Closed | Sun:  Closed

formatted_address.example: 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

compound_code.example: CWC8+W5 Mountain View, California, United States

message.description: Can contain a single string, array, integer or another JSON object. Intentionally vague as it will sometimes contain the error response from the backend server.

size.name: size
size.description: Number of entities in a page to return
